importReadiness.rollbackPath: Remove local package reference com.brassworks.sidecar.grime-decal-wetness-set10 and delete only the isolated GDW10 assigned roots.

dependencies: Unity Package Manager local package reference
No Blender or external DCC source files

visualOnlyContract.intendedRuntimeBehavior: None. All gameplay, collision, lighting, audio, animation, occlusion, and interactable behavior must be added later by the importing project.

validationChecklist: Preview PNG count is 32 plus two contact sheets.
No forbidden prefab components: MonoBehaviour, Collider, Rigidbody, Light, ReflectionProbe, AudioSource, Animation.
No Blender, FBX, OBJ, audio, scene, or external DCC artifacts.

families.name: SootStreaks
families.role: vertical smoke trails from vents, pipe joints, and ceiling leaks

families.name: CornerGrime
families.role: room corner darkening and wet dirt pockets

families.name: DampBands
families.role: low wall moisture lines and seepage bands

families.name: WetFloorReflectionHelpers
families.role: floor-only cards that suggest wet reflected light without lights or probes

families.name: EdgeWearStrips
families.role: thin rubbed/chipped strips for masonry ledges and trim contact edges

families.name: OilStains
families.role: black floor slicks below machinery, boilers, and pipe junctions

families.name: WaterPuddleDecals
families.role: shallow water puddles and wet patches on existing floor materials

families.name: MasonryVariationOverlays
families.role: transparent brick-tone overlays to break repeated masonry surfaces

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_SootStreak_CharcoalHeavy
materials.role: Dense black soot runnels for walls and ceiling seams

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_SootStreak_SoftBrown
materials.role: Softer brown-black smoke staining for upper walls

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_CornerGrime_BlackMold
materials.role: Dark corner accumulation and wet soot pocketing

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_CornerGrime_AshyDust
materials.role: Ashy gray corner dirt for less wet masonry seams

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_DampBand_GreenBlack
materials.role: Low green-black damp tide marks along walls

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_DampBand_CoolSeep
materials.role: Cool blue-gray seep bands and masonry moisture

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_WetReflection_CoolLong
materials.role: Cool elongated floor glints that suggest damp reflection

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_WetReflection_WarmBroken
materials.role: Warm broken amber glints from gaslit wet floor areas

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_EdgeWear_RawStone
materials.role: Pale rubbed stone and chipped masonry edge wear

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_EdgeWear_RustScratch
materials.role: Rusty rubbed strips for iron-framed masonry edges

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_OilStain_BlackSlick
materials.role: Irregular black oil stains for floor corners and machinery bases

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_OilStain_IridescentSheen
materials.role: Thin oily rainbow sheen over existing dark floor materials

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_WaterPuddle_Clear
materials.role: Clear shallow water puddle with soft rim highlights

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_WaterPuddle_Muddy
materials.role: Muddy industrial water puddle with dirty brown center

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_MasonryVariation_DarkPatch
materials.role: Dark masonry block variation overlay for repeated walls

materials.name: GDW10_MAT_MasonryVariation_LimeBloom
materials.role: Pale mineral bloom and mortar breakup over damp brick

roomtest_v0_5_gap_target.addressedGap: finish layer lacks soot streaks, dirty corners, damp bands, floor wetness cues, edge wear, oil/water surface breakup, and varied masonry overlays
placementIntent: wall and ceiling soot trails behind vents and pipes
dark corner dirt that deepens room silhouettes
low damp bands at masonry/floor junctions
floor glint cards that read as wetness without lights or reflection probes
edge wear strips on masonry ledges and trim
oil and water decals under machinery and pipes
masonry color overlays to break repeated wall tiling

package.name: BrassworksBreach.GrimeDecalWetnessSet10
package.unityCompatibility: Unity 2022.3+ text assets; built-in Quad mesh references and built-in Standard shader only.

required_primary_changes: Review as final-layer decal and wetness helper package for roomtest-derived corridors.
Validate transparent sorting and blend modes before importing into gameplay scenes.
Use with room materials and gaslight placement to recover the wet, sooty, reflective north-star surface language.
known_risks: Transparent overlay sorting may need render-pipeline tuning.
Some overlays are subtle and require scene lighting to prove final value.
No decals own collision, gameplay, lighting, or reflection-probe authority.
rollback_path: remove local package reference com.brassworks.sidecar.grime-decal-wetness-set10 and delete isolated package root AssetPacks/BrassworksBreach.GrimeDecalWetnessSet10
